description: Multiple PHP remote file inclusion vulnerabilities in Insky CMS 006-0111, when register_globals is enabled, allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary PHP code via a URL in the ROOT parameter to (1) city.get/city.get.php, (2) city.get/index.php, (3) message2.send/message.send.php, (4) message.send/message.send.php, and (5) pages.add/pages.add.php in insky/modules/.  NOTE: some of these details are obtained from third party information.
